author: SantiMod
content:
@here ATTENTION ALL GUILDS AND GUILD LEADERS

Your chance to submit your presentation for COPA is coming to an end! 

You have until 11:59 PM EST TONIGHT to submit.

Link: https://staratlas.com/partnerships/copa22

Thank you all so much for the incredible submissions so far and we look forward to an incredible event on June 16th.
